name: Spaghetti Pie)+(gwhp32a
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain the spaghetti.
2. Stir butter into the spaghetti.
3. Stir in Parmesan cheese and eggs, then mix into a crust in a 10-inch buttered pie pan.
4. Cook ground beef, onion, and peppers until meat is browned and vegetables are tender. Drain off fat.
5. Stir in undrained tomatoes, tomato paste, sugar, oregano, and garlic salt. Heat through.
6. Spread ricotta cheese over the bottom of the crust.
7. Fill with the tomato mixture.
8. Bake for 20 minutes. Sprinkle mozzarella on top and return to oven until cheese melts, but do not allow it to brown.
9. Serve with good garlic bread and a nice tossed salad.
